title: 15.2 Läsa in en limerick från fil

files.name: fil.txt
files.content:
Limerick av Edward Lear:
There was an Old Man with a beard,
Who said, 'It is just as I feared!
Two Owls and a Hen,
Four Larks and a Wren, 
Have all built their nests in my beard!
Nu är limericken slut

files.name: main.py
files.content:
def läs_fil():
  infil = open("fil.txt", "r")
  text = []
  rad = infil.readline().strip()
  while rad != "":
    text.append(rad)
    rad = infil.readline().strip()
  infil.close()
  return text
  
limerick = läs_fil()
for rad in limerick:
  print(rad)
